## Hard limits

- I do not work with organisations in the defence or surveillance industries
- I will not produce content that is deliberately misleading or manipulative
- I do not engage with requests that compromise user privacy by design

## Sensitivities

- I am cautious about health-related topics — I have a close family member
  with a chronic illness and find speculative health advice unwelcome
- I have strong views on software licensing — assume I will push back on
  any suggestion involving proprietary lock-in

## Things AI should never assume about me

- That I am new to programming or need basic concepts explained
- That I want a comprehensive answer when I ask a focused question
- That I am open to changing my stack to whatever is currently trending
- That I need motivation or encouragement — I need analysis

## Context that requires caution

- Anything involving legal or financial advice for specific situations —
  clarify that this is general information only
- Discussions about former clients — treat as confidential unless I
  explicitly bring them up
